ksa_text: Knowledge of cloud data platform services and infrastructure across major providers, including managed compute, serverless processing, object storage, data warehouse, streaming platforms, and their architectural implications for data and ML workloads.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of infrastructure supporting information technology (IT) for safety, performance, and reliability.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Risks and benefits are mapped for all components of the AI system including third-party software and data.

Risks and benefits are mapped for all components of the AI system including third-party software and data.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-K-015 (AI and Machine Learning/Knowledge) scores 0.410 composite (highest: DCWF at 0.410) and is in_scope for the Knowledge Manager role. Domain prior: edge. Core signal hits: 2. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level Knowledge Manager.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: Include for edge domain (AI and Machine Learning) at composite 0.410. Edge domain inclusion threshold is ≥0.42 for Knowledge Manager.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Overturned to exclude. Edge domain (AI and Machine Learning) inclusion requires composite ≥0.42; 0.410 is below threshold. Revised to exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this AI and Machine Learning KSA (composite 0.410)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of Knowledge Manager job postings does not surface this AI and Machine Learning competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Overturned to exclude. Edge domain (AI and Machine Learning) inclusion requires composite ≥0.42; 0.410 is below threshold. Revised to exclude.
